questionHtml:
What is the strongest acid in the equation below?

H3AsO4 + H2O ⇌ H2AsO4− + H3O+      Kc = 4.5 × 10−4

A.  H3AsO4

B.  H2O

C.  H2AsO4−

D.  H3O+
